# Product Documentation Instructions

Use this file for work that writes or updates `docs/product/` or product-oriented feature summaries.

## Source of truth

- actual user-visible behavior in the frontend
- business logic implemented in backend use cases
- current feature inventory in `docs/features/`

## Cover

- user concepts
- business rules
- task lifecycle behavior
- recurrence behavior from a user/product perspective
- roles, permissions, and user-facing workflows

## Do not confuse with

- API transport details
- repository internals
- deployment/runbook details
